ham.subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation – Order #123-4567890-1234567
ham.body:
Hi Rajesh,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! Your order has been successfully placed and is now being processed.

Order Details:
• Order ID: 123-4567890-1234567
• Items:
   1. Sony 55" 4K Ultra HD Smart LED TV – ₹59,999
   2. Wireless Bluetooth Speaker – ₹3,499
   3. Amazon Echo Dot (3rd Gen) – ₹2,499
• Total (incl. tax & delivery): ₹66,997

Shipping Address:
Rajesh Kumar
123, Main Street
Sector 5, Gurugram
Haryana 122001

Delivery Date: 10‑15 Oct 2026

If you have any questions or need to change your shipping address, please reply to this email or visit your order page: <URL>

Thank you for choosing Amazon. Happy shopping!

Regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: QuickBooks Invoice #2023-00123: Immediate Payment Required
spam.body:
Dear Rajesh,

We hope you are doing well. Our records show that the following invoice has not been settled and is now overdue:

• Invoice Number: 2023-00123
• Vendor: Norton Security Solutions
• Amount Due: ₹15,250
• Due Date: 30‑Sep‑2026

If this invoice has already been paid, please disregard this notice. Otherwise, please complete the payment within 48 hours to avoid service interruption. Failure to pay may result in suspension of your QuickBooks account.

To verify and settle the invoice, click the link below:

<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks Billing Team

*This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email.*
